title: Fishing Nets
content:
The polar stars drip in blood . . .
        Orion's mythical crystal white
        with clarity of forest and
        low expanse of sky;
        wooden barques, incandescent,
        row peals of silver light
        sowing each slough of wave,
        spider hues drip upon wetness
        forlorn with tug and rein.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Fishing Nets"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
